title: Prompt Security, Untrusted Context, Privacy, and Authorization · Regression Repair Bay
summary: Harden a tool-using prompt that processes untrusted documents and external results. Learners isolate plausible failures, compare competing hypotheses, and record cause-level repair evidence. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in a prompt threat model and red-team suite and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Separate trusted instructions from untrusted data and label authority boundaries.
Recognize direct and indirect prompt injection and prevent authority escalation.
Exclude secrets and irrelevant proprietary context and minimize tool privileges.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Implement the cause-level repair
steps.instruction: Append a contract headed "Evidence: prompt-red-team-maintenance-10jihz" with concrete Goal, Context, Constraints, Output, and Done when sections tailored to this case.
steps.why: Building a runnable or mechanically reviewable artifact turns Red Team Maintenance into observable performance evidence.

content.code:
Evidence: prompt-red-team-maintenance-10jihz
Goal: [replace with one observable outcome]
Context: [replace with decision-relevant facts]
Constraints: [replace with authority and safety boundaries]
Output: [replace with the artifact and evidence shape]
Done when: [replace with changed-case acceptance criteria]
content.caption: Shape of the required increment; replace generic language with the current stakeholder case.
